summary: New `search items` subcommand (internal/cli/search_items.go): FTS5 query over pp_dataset_items, joined to the normalized columns, with --since / --actors / --limit filters. Registered as a child of the generated `search` command via local-variable capture in root.go so the generic resources-FTS `search` is left intact.
rationale: Cross-Actor full-text search has no spec endpoint; it reads the local normalized item store.
